forms.title: FIAS Admin Application (STRICT)
forms.description: This form is for people who want to become ADMIN in the FIAS Remake. This is NOT easy. Read EVERYTHING before applying.

questions.label: ADMIN RULE SHEET
questions.content: ADMIN IS EARNED NOT GIVEN: The game is STILL in development so you will NOT get admin right away. You must prove yourself first by being active, helping the team, and showing trust. If you are inactive, abuse power, or do nothing you will be removed, banned, and possibly blacklisted. You must follow ALL dev rules including joining the voice channel, screen sharing, and showing proof of work. Admins are expected to help moderate, test, and improve the game at all times.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: IMPORTANT: This is NOT a free admin form. You will NOT get admin instantly.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: The game is still being worked on. It will take time before admin roles are even fully given out.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: You MUST prove yourself before getting admin. This includes activity, helping, and trust.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: If you apply just to get admin and do nothing, you will be removed.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Admins are expected to help with moderation, testing, and keeping the community under control.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Abuse of power = instant removal and ban.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Inactivity = removal.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Not helping = removal.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: You MUST be active in Discord and in development/testing.

questions.label: Where did you find this form?
If Other, where did you find it?
What Roblox age group are you in?
What can you help with as an admin?
Admin Path
questions.placeholder: Type one: Moderation, Testing, Community, Support, Hybrid, Other

prompts: How would you handle rule breakers?
What bugs do you look for?
Example of a bug you found before
How would you help grow the community?
How would you help new players?
How do you explain things clearly?
Why do you want to do multiple roles?

questions.label: Do you understand you will NOT get admin instantly?
Do you understand you must earn admin through trust and work?
Are you willing to wait and prove yourself?
Will you stay active and help consistently?
Do you understand abuse of power will get you removed and banned?
Do you understand inactivity will get you removed?
Have you joined the Discord server?
What would you do as an admin?
Imported Text
questions.content: FINAL WARNING: Admin is NOT given for free.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: If you are here just for power, DO NOT APPLY.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: You must earn it.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Only serious people will be accepted.

forms.title: {NEW} FIAS Remake Dev Team Application
forms.description: This form is for people who want to help make a remake of Fight in a School (FIAS) on Roblox. Read EVERYTHING carefully before applying.

questions.label: DEV RULE SHEET
questions.content: REQUIRED RULES: You MUST join the Discord server https://discord.gg/QbCDbkd4v . There are TWO separate games (Coding/Animating/UI and Building). You MUST actually work and show real progress. Doing small or lazy work (like placing a few toolbox items and leaving) is NOT allowed. If you are inactive for more than 3 weeks you will be removed, blacklisted from the game, and banned from the server. Blacklist means no access to the game at all including alternate accounts. When working you MUST join the "working on game" voice channel and screen share the entire time. You MUST take screenshots when you JOIN and when you LEAVE the voice channel as proof. The system logs EVERYTHING including opening, editing, testing, or doing anything. If you are working and NOT in the voice channel you will be punished. Voice Channel Link: https://discord.com/channels/1482562979177431223/1488651165423112232

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: IMPORTANT RULES: There are TWO separate games. One is for Coding, Animating, UI, and systems. The other is for Building and map design.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: You MUST join the Discord server: https://discord.gg/QbCDbkd4v

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: You are REQUIRED to actually WORK on the game. You cannot sit in the server waiting for admin, roles, or benefits.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Lazy work is NOT allowed. You cannot just place a few toolbox items and leave. I MUST see real effort and progress.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: I must see real progress. If you do not work for more than 3 weeks, you will be removed.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: If you join the game in Studio and do nothing, it will still be logged and treated as inactivity.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Consequences: removal, blacklist from the game, and ban from the Discord server.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Blacklist means you will not be able to access the game at all, including alternate accounts.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: When working, you MUST join the "working on game" voice channel and screen share the entire time.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: You MUST take screenshots when you JOIN and when you LEAVE the voice channel as proof.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: The system logs everything including opening, editing, testing, or doing anything in the game.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: If you are working and NOT in the voice channel, you will be punished.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Voice Channel Link (JOIN "working on game" ONLY): https://discord.com/channels/1482562979177431223/1488651165423112232

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: When chatting while working, you are REQUIRED to use comments in Roblox Studio if needed.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: How to leave comments in Roblox Studio: Right click in the script area or use the comment feature in scripts (example: -- This is a comment in Lua).

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content:
Tutorial video for comments: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ   






ps: I could not find a working video that shows how.

All jokes aside though!

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: Some Roblox age groups may restrict collaboration. If your account has restrictions, you may need to use a trusted connection setting.

questions.label: Imported Text
questions.content: If you know how to set trusted connections on Roblox, you may still be allowed. If not, it may limit your ability to join.
